description:
AI Strategy Call: https://cal.com/bradley-bonanno/ai-strategy-call
Connect with Me: https://www.linkedin.com/in/bradbonanno/
Full Setup Guide + Claude.md (free): https://brad-b.kit.com/be466ba5df

Anthropic just shipped Claude Code Channels, Scheduled Tasks, and Auto Memory - three features that replace everything OpenClaude does, without exposing ports, leaking API keys, or running sketchy open source code on your machine.

In this Claude Code tutorial I walk through my exact setup for texting Claude from Telegram and having it do real work on my machine. I send it a message, it reads my files, runs my SEO workflow, sends reports back as attachments, and schedules cron jobs - all from my phone. No VPS. No Docker. No third-party wrappers. Just Claude Code running natively with a Telegram bot.

I also share my Claude.md file that makes the Telegram experience 10x better - shorter mobile-friendly responses, progress updates so you're never left on read, auto memory checks before every task, and guardrails for running with dangerously-skip-permissions.

In this video I cover:
- Why OpenClaude is no longer necessary (and where it went wrong)
- Setting up Claude Code Channels with Telegram step by step
- Creating a Telegram bot via BotFather and pairing it with Claude Code
- Scheduled tasks and cron jobs with the /loop command
- Auto memory for persistent context across sessions
- My custom Claude.md for Telegram-optimised Claude Code
- Running Claude Code 24/7 on a dedicated machine
- Permission handling and safety guardrails

Links
